meaning: 温布尔登[英国英格兰东南部城市](位于伦敦附近,是著名的国际网球比赛地)
examples: Wimbledon is a shrine for all lovers of tennis.
There's an exciting match on at Wimbledon right now.
A back injury forced her to withdraw from Wimbledon.
There are 22 shops all over London, from Bow Lane and Covent Garden to Richmond and Wimbledon.
At last year's Wimbledon, Nadal lost to the 6-foot-5 Lukas Rosol in the second round.
